# Rosendin

Rosendin is a large electrical contractor and integration partner for data centers, industrial systems, and utility-linked power delivery programs.

## Why it matters
- Brings real field labor and installation credibility into a graph that was previously too product-heavy.
- Strengthens the execution layer between packaged equipment and commissioned infrastructure.
- Helps turn electrical design intent into believable site delivery.

## Best fit
- Hyperscale and mission-critical programs with complex power trains.
- Fast-track electrical integration where coordination and field execution are bottlenecks.
- Projects coupling packaged substations, ATS gear, and modular power rooms.

## Operational role in the graph
- Directly strengthens `electrical-integration-services`.
- Pulls `prefabricated-power-blocks`, `modular-substations`, and `ats-and-transfer-systems` into real field delivery.
- Improves the handoff from packaged power to energization and commissioning.
